alias.description: The alias of the aggregation logic table.

api_id.description: The ID of the API after the aggregation logic table is published.

business_asset.description: The synchronization status of the business asset after the aggregation logic table is published.

compression.description: The compression level of the DWS table.

configs.description: The additional configuration of the aggregation logic table, in JSON format.

create_time.description: The creation time of the aggregation logic table, in RFC3339 format.

created_by.description: The account name of the user who created the aggregation logic table.

data_quality.description: The status of the data quality job creation after the aggregation logic table is published.

db_name.description: The name of the database corresponding to the data connection.

del_type.description: The deletion type when the aggregation logic table is deleted.

description.description: The description of the aggregation logic table.

dev_physical_table.description: The status of the table creation in the development environment after the aggregation logic table is published.

dimension_group.description: The ID of the statistical dimension of the derived indicator.

dirty_out_database.description: The output database of the dirty data.

dirty_out_prefix.description: The prefix of the dirty data table.

dirty_out_suffix.description: The suffix of the dirty data table.

dirty_out_switch.description: Whether to enable dirty data output switch.

distribute.description: The distribution mode of the database.

distribute_column.description: The column used for hash distribution.

dlf_task.description: The status of the DLF task after the aggregation logic table is published.

dlf_task_id.description: The ID of the DLF task after the aggregation logic table is published.

dw_id.description: The ID of the data connection.

dw_name.description: The name of the data connection.

dw_type.description: The type of the data connection.

env_type.description: The publishing environment type of the aggregation logic table.

group_code.description: The dimension group code of the derivative metric.

group_name.description: The name of the dimension group of the derivative metric.

l3_id.description: The ID of the business subject to which the aggregation logic table belongs.

meta_data_link.description: The status of the asset association after the aggregation logic table is published.

model_id.description: The ID of the model to which the aggregation logic table belongs.

obs_location.description: The OBS storage path of the external table.

owner.description: The asset owner of the aggregation logic table.

partition_conf.description: The partition expression of the aggregation logic table.

physical_table.description: The status of the table creation in the production environment after the aggregation logic table is published.

pre_combine_field.description: The column used for record combine or versioning.

publish_to_dlm.description: The status of the DLM API generation after the aggregation logic table is published.

quality_id.description: The ID of the data quality.

queue_name.description: The queue name corresponding to the DLI data connection.

region.description: The region where the aggregation logic table is located.

schema.description: The name of the database schema.

secret_type.description: The type of the data secrecy level.

sql.description: The SQL statement of the aggregation logic table.

status.description: The publishing status of the aggregation logic table.

summary_status.description: The synchronization status of the summary after the aggregation logic table is published.

table_type.description: The type of the database table.

tb_guid.description: The technical catalog asset GUID after the aggregation logic table is published.

tb_logic_guid.description: The business catalog asset GUID after the aggregation logic table is published.

tb_logic_name.description: The display name in Chinese of the aggregation logic table.

tb_name.description: The physical table name in English of the aggregation logic table.

technical_asset.description: The synchronization status of the technical asset after the aggregation logic table is published.

update_time.description: The latest update time of the aggregation logic table, in RFC3339 format.

workspace_id.description: The workspace ID to which the aggregation logic table belongs.

fd_name_ch.description: The Chinese display name of the custom extended field.

fd_name_en.description: The English name of the custom extended field.

fd_value.description: The value of the custom extended field.

not_null.description: Whether the custom extended field requires a value.

block.description: The list of user-defined extended fields for the aggregation logic table.

attribute_type.description: The configuration type of the attribute.

data_type.description: The data type of the attribute.

data_type_extend.description: The data type extend field of attribute.

domain_type.description: The domain type of the attribute.

is_partition_key.description: Whether the attribute is used as a partition key.

is_primary_key.description: Whether the attribute is the primary key.

name_ch.description: The Chinese name of the attribute.

name_en.description: The English name of the attribute.

not_null.description: Whether the attribute is not null.

ordinal.description: The sequence number of the attribute.

ref_id.description: The ID of the object referenced by the attribute.

ref_name_ch.description: The Chinese name of the object associated with the attribute.

ref_name_en.description: The English name of the object associated with the attribute.

stand_row_id.description: The ID of the data standard associated with the attribute.

stand_row_name.description: The name of the data standard associated with the attribute.

id.description: The ID of the secrecy level.

name.description: The name of the secrecy level.

uuid.description: The UUID of the secrecy level.

block.description: The list of secrecy levels associated with the attribute.
The list of attributes of the aggregation logic table.

schema:{"Internal":true};The script configuration value of this change is also the original value used for comparison with
the new value next time the change is made. The corresponding parameter name is 'table_attributes'.
